Package com.rays.common

Class BaseCtl<T extends BaseDTO,​S extends BaseServiceInt<T>,​F extends BaseForm<T>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseCtl<T,​S,​F>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - the DTO type extending BaseDTO
    S - the service type extending BaseServiceInt
    F - the form type extending BaseForm
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    CollegeCtl, CourseCtl, FacultyCtl, JasperCtl, LoginCtl, MarksheetCtl, RoleCtl, StudentCtl, SubjectCtl, TimetableCtl, UserCtl
    public class BaseCtl<T extends BaseDTO,​S extends BaseServiceInt<T>,​F extends BaseForm<T>>
extends java.lang.Object
    Generic base controller providing common CRUD operations for all ORS controllers.

    This abstract-style class is parameterized with a DTO type T, a service interface S, and a form type F, allowing reuse of save, delete, find, and search functionality across different modules.

    Author:
    Krati Trivedi

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private int pageSize
      The page size used for paginated search results, injected from application properties.
      protected S service
      The service instance auto-injected for performing business logic operations.
      UserContext userContext
      Holds the current user's context for authorization and audit purposes.

    • Field Detail

      • service

        @Autowired
protected S extends BaseServiceInt<T> service
        The service instance auto-injected for performing business logic operations.

      • pageSize

        @Value("${page.size}")
private int pageSize
        The page size used for paginated search results, injected from application properties.

      • userContext

        public UserContext userContext
        Holds the current user's context for authorization and audit purposes.

    • Constructor Detail

      • BaseCtl

        public BaseCtl()

    • Method Detail

      • validate

        public ORSResponse validate​(org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
        Validates the binding result from a form submission.

        If there are field-level validation errors, they are collected into a map and attached to the response as input errors.

        Parameters:
        bindingResult - the BindingResult from the validated form
        Returns:
        an ORSResponse indicating success or containing validation errors

      • setUserContext

        @ModelAttribute
public void setUserContext()
        Initializes the UserContext before each request.

        Retrieves the context from UserContextHolder. If no context is found, a default user context is created using a fallback login.

      • save

        @PostMapping("save")
public ORSResponse save​(@RequestBody @Valid
                        F form,
                        org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
        Saves or updates a record based on the submitted form data.

        Performs validation first. If the DTO has a unique key defined, it checks for duplicate records before proceeding. Returns an appropriate success or failure message depending on whether the operation is an insert or update.

        Parameters:
        form - the form object containing DTO data, validated via @Valid
        bindingResult - the result of form validation
        Returns:
        an ORSResponse indicating the outcome of the save operation

      • deleteMany

        @PostMapping("deleteMany/{ids}")
public ORSResponse deleteMany​(@PathVariable
                              long[] ids,
                              @RequestParam("pageNo")
                              int pageNo,
                              @RequestBody
                              F form)
        Deletes multiple records by their IDs and returns updated search results.

        After deletion, performs a search using the provided form criteria to return the remaining records for the given page. Also checks if a next page exists.

        Parameters:
        ids - an array of record IDs to be deleted
        pageNo - the current page number for refreshing results after deletion
        form - the form containing search criteria for the post-delete result fetch
        Returns:
        an ORSResponse with the updated list of records or a not-found message

      • findByPk

        @GetMapping("get/{id}")
public ORSResponse findByPk​(@PathVariable
                            long id)
        Retrieves a single record by its primary key.
        Parameters:
        id - the primary key of the record to retrieve
        Returns:
        an ORSResponse containing the found DTO, or a failure message if not found

      • search

        @RequestMapping(value="search/{pageNo}",
                method={GET,POST})
public ORSResponse search​(@RequestBody
                          F form,
                          @PathVariable(required=false)
                          int pageNo)
        Searches for records matching the given form criteria with pagination support.

        Accepts both GET and POST requests. Returns a paginated list of matching records along with the size of the next page to support client-side pagination controls.

        Parameters:
        form - the form containing search/filter criteria
        pageNo - the page number to retrieve (0-based); negative values default to 0
        Returns:
        an ORSResponse containing the matching records or a not-found message
